executive_summary:
The Department of Defence requires comprehensive sustainment support for its eTools and DDM systems. Fujitsu proposes a solution that leverages its extensive experience in IT service management, aligning with ITIL v4 standards to ensure high-quality and consistent service delivery. Our approach includes effective management of the Commonwealth's server, network, and application software, ensuring compatibility with existing ICT environments and adherence to specified requirements.

Fujitsu's key differentiators include a robust performance management framework and a commitment to meeting all KPIs through regular performance reviews and comprehensive reporting. Our project management strategy involves detailed planning and regular progress assessments, ensuring transparency and accountability throughout the project lifecycle.

Our delivery approach is underpinned by a commitment to the Australian Industry Capability (AIC) obligations, maximizing local industry participation. Fujitsu's pricing structure is designed to meet the Commonwealth's requirements, with flexibility to discuss alternative proposals that align with the Commonwealth's objectives.

Fujitsu's solution reduces risk through adherence to stringent security frameworks and compliance with all legal and policy requirements, including the Digital Service Standard. Our commitment to managing Intellectual Property as per the Work Order further ensures the protection of the Commonwealth's interests.
